file.string: Discover a diet perfectly tailored\nto your unique body constitution\n(Prakriti).
Gain deep insights into your health trends\nand see the positive impact of living in\nbalance.
We prioritize your privacy with medical-grade security, ensuring your health journey remains yours alone.
ENCRYPTION • HIPAA COMPLIANCE • NO DATA SELLING
Enter your details to find your Prakriti.
I agree to the Terms of Service and Privacy Policy.
Please enter a valid email address
Password must be at least 6 characters
Sign up failed. Please try again.
Account created! Check your email to verify.
Reconnect with your natural rhythm\nand ancient wisdom.
We\u2019ve sent an 8-digit code to your email. Enter it below to align your account.
New code sent to your email!
Code has expired. Please request a new one.
To begin your Ayurvedic journey, we need to understand your unique physical vessel. These metrics help us calculate your baseline Prakriti.
Physical markers are the external manifestation of internal energy flows. Your weight and height provide the initial canvas for our AI to assess your metabolic fire.
Your data is stored securely and used only for your\nwellness plan.
How would you describe your daily physical movement?
Light exercise or walking 3–4 times a week.
Daily intense physical training or labor.
In Ayurveda, sleep is called \u201CNidra\u201D. It is one of the three pillars of life. Consistent routines help balance the Vata dosha for better rest.
No meat, includes dairy and honey.
Includes poultry, fish, or red meat.
Your dietary habits and health history are the foundation of your Ayurvedic blueprint. This data allows our AI to adjust herb recommendations specifically to your body\'s rhythm.
Calm the Vata and find mental peace.
"Health is not merely the absence of disease; it is the presence of joy and the harmonious flow of energy between your unique Prakriti and the world around you."
Insights update in real-time as you refine your profile.
Discover your Prakriti and begin your personalised wellness journey.
You can change this anytime from your profile settings.
AyurBalance uses your region to apply the correct seasonal dietary protocol (Ritucharya). Your exact coordinates are never stored — only your climate zone.
Coordinates are not stored. Only your broad climate zone is saved locally on your device.
This helps us apply the right seasonal food guidelines (Ritucharya) for your area.
